reviews.review_description:
This kart racer fails on the most basic level, the handling. The physics feel way off. No matter how good the rest of the game is, if the driving isn’t fun the game isn’t fun.

And the rest of the game isn’t good.

The graphics are extremely simplified to the point where it looks like a Nintendo 64 game and the track designs are very bland. Those who value resolution above all else will be pleased though since the resolution is high on the Quest 3.

It’s also glitchy. During the tutorial what I think was supposed to be a video giving instructions was just a jumbled mess.  In menus the laser pointer jumps around.  There could be more glitches but I didn’t want to play it past the refund window.

It’s even less of a compelling purchase because Quest has Galaxy Kart which runs very well on Quest 3 now that it’s out of early access. Galaxy Kart is a much better game in every way, except resolution. Sacrificing resolution for beautiful environments with interesting and creative courses is a small sacrifice.
I've been playing Touring Karts PRO for 3 days and it's a great game! Add me to compete in daily events and Championships 🏎🏁 User: Fer_777
Terrible graphics terrible everything.  And wont allow for a refund.
Easy to get stuck into for hours, it's fun, not stressful. Lots of cool power ups and bonuses and driving in VR feels great. I play this everyday, it's awesome!

It’s a lot of fun and it controls well enough. I got it on sale for five dollars so it’s especially worth it. Main drawback is that there ￼aren’t enough players (yet) for multiplayer to set up a match. But the game gets points for having multiplayer in the first place. If you like racing games like Mario kart, then this game is for you.
This game is so fun (probably cuz I like Mario kart)

The gameplay is pretty cool. Very user friendly Controls and really do like the different views you can choose. The views are awesome... Quite a few things to achieve Unlocking cars upgrades many, many, many different Courses, circuits etc. etc. Multiplayer mode, Single player mode pretty kewl all around.....

I am a Chinese player，for now， it need to switch to the Chinese Language in the setting panel manually，if system can detect it automatically，I think it is more better
If could，maybe the begining tutorial will show the correct Language but for not just English

well...
three months passed, the problem still there
it sucks

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know. We have detected the problem with the automatic detection of Chinese. It will be available in a few days, along with other improvements we are working on.

reviews.review_description: Okay maybe it's not as technically impressive as Dash Dash, but the  awesome physics engine allows for all sorts of chaos like landing on other drivers and flipping end over end. I love it!  The music is just what I want in a game like this; catchy but not annoying. 5 stars!!!

reviews.review_title: A really super VR Karting game
reviews.review_description:
Played the demo and really enjoyed it, so i purchased the complete pro package.
I really enjoy this game, it doesnt get 5 stars yet as its still a little bit unpolished and gitchy at times.
Ie if i am 3rd my trophy cup is floating in mid air not in my hand.
Other wise this is as close to another karting game on Nintendo that i have seen, loads of combos and tracks to complete. For £11 its going to be one of your better VR purchases i can promisr you that.
Single player or multi player and even just friends can play.
5 out of 5

I completed all of the challenges in the free version but wanted to play more so I bought the pro version! So glad I did! The quests are fun to accomplish, and I like how it’s like a VR Mario Kart. It would be cool if there were more customization options but that’s not a big deal. This is my new favorite game on the Quest!!

reviews.review_title: So I liked the demo and purchased
reviews.review_description:
For some reason after purchasing, instead of continuing the existing game, I have a second version of the game (downloaded twice)  and have to start from scratch. 

It looks like a great game, will update rating if I can actually play it  (without having to start from scratch)
